children.heading: Masters degree programs at historically Black colleges and universities
children.label: a Masters degree programs at historically Black colleges and universities
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009 and each of the five succeeding fiscal years.section 1136a of this title

children.heading: Masters degree programs at predominantly Black institutions
children.label: b Masters degree programs at predominantly Black institutions
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009 and each of the five succeeding fiscal years.section 1136b of this title
